# 3D Printing

The BugBot chassis is made up of several 3D-printed parts. No support material is needed for any of them.

!!! note "STL files coming soon"
    The STL files will be linked here once they are published. In the meantime, contact the BugBotLab team if you need them.

---

## Parts to print

| Part | Qty | STL | Notes |
|---|:---:|---|---|
| Base plate | 1 | _coming soon_ | Main chassis floor |
| Motor mount × 4 | 4 | _coming soon_ | One per motor |
| PCB standoff plate | 1 | _coming soon_ | Holds the carrier PCB |
| Camera bracket | 1 | _coming soon_ | Forward-facing mount for OV5640 |
| ToF bracket | 1 | _coming soon_ | Forward-facing mount for VL53L5CX |
| Top cover (optional) | 1 | _coming soon_ | Protects electronics |

---

## Recommended print settings

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| Material | PLA or PETG |
| Layer height | 0.2 mm |
| Infill | 20% |
| Supports | None required |
| Bed adhesion | Brim recommended for motor mounts |

---

## Next steps

Once all parts are printed, move on to [assembly](assembly.md).
